description_long: This is a rugged, military-style all-terrain vehicle with a matte dark green exterior, designed for off-road and urban utility. The vehicle features a boxy, utilitarian body with four doors, reinforced bumpers, and a roof rack loaded with gear and equipment. Protective metal bars run along the roof and sides, and additional equipment is mounted on the hood and roof, including spare containers and possibly tools. The tires are large and knobby, optimized for rough terrain, and the undercarriage clearance is high for obstacle navigation. The front is equipped with multiple spotlights above the windshield and a winch, indicating readiness for challenging environments. The rear shows a ladder for roof access and additional storage, emphasizing its expedition-ready design.
description: A matte dark green, boxy all-terrain vehicle with roof racks, rugged tires, and reinforced bumpers, designed for off-road and urban use. It features spotlights, a winch, and extensive storage for expedition readiness.
description_view_0: Side view showing four doors, large knobby tires, roof rack with gear, and protective metal bars.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the ladder, rear storage compartments, and the full width of the roof rack.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, with visible doors, tires, and roof equipment.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the spotlights, winch, reinforced bumper, and hood-mounted equipment.
attribute_tire_tread_pattern: The tires have a knobby, blocky tread pattern designed for maximum grip on rough and uneven terrain, suitable for all-terrain use.
